○ pv-decomp [EPIC] · Example decomposed epic   [● P3 · OPEN]
Owner: Stephen Howard · Type: epic
Created: 2026-04-16 · Updated: 2026-04-16

DESCRIPTION
Add password reset functionality with email verification for all user accounts. Users should be able to request a reset, receive a token via email, and set a new password.

DESIGN
Create a reset token table, a request-reset endpoint, an email template, and a set-new-password endpoint. Tokens expire after 30 minutes. Only one active token per account.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
- [ ] Token table created with proper indexes
- [ ] Request-reset endpoint rate limited
- [ ] Email template includes translated reset link

CHILDREN
  ↳ ○ pv-decomp.1: Create reset-token entity and migration ● P3
  ↳ ○ pv-decomp.2: Add request-reset API endpoint ● P3
  ↳ ○ pv-decomp.3: Add set-new-password API endpoint ● P3
  ○ 0/3 complete (0%)
